feature_description: Validates the calculation, rounding, and component validation of aggregated market-risk-component margin per LME Rulebook requirements.

scenarios.title: Calculate and round aggregated market-risk-component margin

given_steps.step_text: Rounding parameter in Initial Margin Risk Parameter File is 10,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounding parameter in Initial Margin Risk Parameter File is 10,000

when_steps.step_text: the clearing participant calculates the aggregated market-risk-component margin
when_steps.step_pattern: the clearing participant calculates the aggregated market-risk-component margin

when_steps.step_text: the system applies rounding up to the nearest 10,000
when_steps.step_pattern: the system applies rounding up to the nearest 10,000

then_steps.step_text: the aggregated margin before rounding is calculated as 46,929,904
then_steps.step_pattern: the aggregated margin before rounding is calculated as 46,929,904

then_steps.step_text: the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin is 46,930,000

assumptions: All margin component values are provided in the correct currency and format
The rounding parameter is correctly configured in the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File

scenarios.title: Rounding when aggregated margin is exact multiple of rounding parameter

given_steps.step_text: Aggregated margin before rounding is exactly 46,930,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Aggregated margin before rounding is exactly 46,930,000

given_steps.step_text: Rounding parameter in Initial Margin Risk Parameter File is 10,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounding parameter in Initial Margin Risk Parameter File is 10,000

when_steps.step_text: the system applies rounding up to the nearest 10,000
when_steps.step_pattern: the system applies rounding up to the nearest 10,000

then_steps.step_text: the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin remains 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin remains 46,930,000

then_steps.step_text: no upward adjustment is applied since value is already at the rounding boundary
then_steps.step_pattern: no upward adjustment is applied since value is already at the rounding boundary

assumptions: When the value is already at a rounding boundary, rounding up does not increase the value
The rounding parameter of 10,000 is used as the boundary value from the evidence example

scenarios.title: Validate all margin components are present for aggregation calculation

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant portfolio with margin calculation request
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant portfolio with margin calculation request

when_steps.step_pattern: the system validates the presence of all margin components

when_steps.step_pattern: the system validates the rounding parameter from the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File

then_steps.step_pattern: Portfolio margin is present and valid

then_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin is present and valid

then_steps.step_pattern: Liquidation risk add-on is present and valid

then_steps.step_text: Structured product add-on is present and valid
then_steps.step_pattern: Structured product add-on is present and valid

then_steps.step_text: Corporate action position margin is present and valid
then_steps.step_pattern: Corporate action position margin is present and valid

then_steps.step_text: Holiday add-on is present and valid
then_steps.step_pattern: Holiday add-on is present and valid

then_steps.step_text: Rounding parameter is retrieved from the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File
then_steps.step_pattern: Rounding parameter is retrieved from the Initial Margin Risk Parameter File

assumptions: Each margin component must be a non-negative numeric value
The rounding parameter must be a positive integer

feature_description: Validates the correct application of margin credit to calculate net margin after credit using the Maximum formula, including boundary conditions and data validation.

scenarios.title: Apply margin credit to calculate net margin after credit

when_steps.step_text: the system calculates net margin after credit
when_steps.step_pattern: the system calculates net margin after credit

when_steps.step_text: the system applies the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula
when_steps.step_pattern: the system applies the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula

then_steps.step_text: net margin after credit is calculated as 41,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: net margin after credit is calculated as 41,930,000

assumptions: The margin credit value of 5,000,000 is the standard value as stated in the guide
Net margin before credit is the rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin

scenarios.title: Net margin after credit when net margin equals margin credit

given_steps.step_text: Net margin before credit is exactly 5,000,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Net margin before credit is exactly 5,000,000

when_steps.step_text: the system calculates net margin after credit
when_steps.step_pattern: the system calculates net margin after credit

when_steps.step_text: the system applies the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula
when_steps.step_pattern: the system applies the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula

then_steps.step_text: the Maximum function ensures the result is not negative
then_steps.step_pattern: the Maximum function ensures the result is not negative

assumptions: The boundary value of 5,000,000 is derived from the margin credit value stated in the evidence
When Net margin equals Margin credit, the result is exactly 0

scenarios.title: Validate margin credit value and Maximum function application

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant with margin calculation request
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant with margin calculation request

when_steps.step_text: the system validates the margin credit value
when_steps.step_pattern: the system validates the margin credit value

when_steps.step_text: the system validates the Maximum function logic for net margin calculation
when_steps.step_pattern: the system validates the Maximum function logic for net margin calculation

then_steps.step_text: margin credit is a valid positive numeric value
then_steps.step_pattern: margin credit is a valid positive numeric value

then_steps.step_text: the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula is correctly implemented
then_steps.step_pattern: the Maximum[0, (Net margin – Margin credit)] formula is correctly implemented

then_steps.step_text: net margin after credit is never negative regardless of input values
then_steps.step_pattern: net margin after credit is never negative regardless of input values

assumptions: The margin credit value should match the configured value (normally 5,000,000)
The Maximum function ensures floor at 0 for all scenarios
